history.text: Belize became a Commonwealth realm, keeping the monarch as head of state after independence.

worthSeeing.title: Great Blue Hole:
worthSeeing.text: A 300 m wide underwater sinkhole - one of the world's top dive sites.

worthSeeing.title: Mayan Ruins:
worthSeeing.text: Xunantunich, Caracol and Lamanai are among the best-preserved Maya sites.

worthSeeing.title: Belize Barrier Reef:
worthSeeing.text: The second-largest coral reef system on Earth, UNESCO listed.
